---
pagetitle: "Rohit Pillai"
title: "Rohit Pillai"
image: images/profile.jpg
image-alt: "Rohit Pillai"
toc: false
anchor-sections: false

about:
  template: solana
  id: hero-heading
  image-width: 22em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/RohitWPillai
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=eE9rDfkAAAAJ
    - icon: r-circle
      text: esearchGate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Rohit-Pillai-2
    - icon: building
      text: Edinburgh
      href: https://eng.ed.ac.uk/about/people/dr-rohit-pillai
    - icon: people-fill
      text: Group Website
      href: https://multiscaleflowx.github.io

page-layout: full

resources:
  - assets/index.css
  - assets/simulation.css

include-after-body:
  - assets/simulation.html
  - assets/halo.html

header-includes: |
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/index.css">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/simulation.css">
---
